name: Stok Minimum - Filter Gudang, Filter Kategori, Lihat Warning Stok Menipis
description: Test stok minimum/alert: lihat daftar barang yang stok di bawah minimum, filter gudang, filter kategori. Login admin.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Click Stok Minimum menu in the sidebar
Stok Minimum page is visible showing products with low stock warnings
Select a warehouse from the gudang filter dropdown
List is filtered showing low stock products for selected warehouse
Select a category from the kategori filter dropdown
List is filtered by category showing only products in that category with low stock
Type a product name in the search box to filter
Search results show matching products with their current stock vs minimum stock
